differentials.name: Invasion of aryepiglottic cartilage by squamous cell carcinoma of larynx / piriform sinus
differentials.raw: Invasion of aryepiglottic cartilage by squamous cell carcinoma of larynx / piriform sinus

context: √  subglottic air seen anterior to obliquely imaged vocal cord ≠ dilated laryngeal ventricle √  immobilization of vocal cords √  apparent medialization of cord by thickening from enhancing tumor √  obliteration of normal fat planes √  sclerosis of adjacent cartilage √  regional lymphadenopathy √  poorly defined cricoarytenoid joint √  disparity in height of vocal cords (coronal CT) √  "medialization" of paralyzed cord (to improve glottis closure + competence) Epiglottic Enlargement
